reviews.text: Mary's Mexican Grill in downtown Woodstock is a must-visit! Their $2.50 tamales are absolutely to die for—full of flavor and perfectly made. I highly recommend stopping by to enjoy some delicious, authentic Mexican food. It's a great spot for a tasty and affordable meal!
